artifact.optimizeDescription: Generate a clearer, more complete version based on the current document. A new version will be created upon completion.
artifact.generatedNewVersion: New version generated, will be applied automatically.
artifact.aiWillOptimize: AI will generate optimization suggestions based on the current version.
artifact.optimizeInstructionDesc: Describe in a sentence or two how you want AI to adjust this document.
artifact.optimizePlaceholder: e.g. Add more technical details, improve language, add risk assessment...
artifact.focusTip: Focusing on a single goal works best.
artifact.generatingNewVersion: Generating new version in real time...

landing.heroDesc: PRD · Code · Design · Prototype — all generated by AI in one place. Turn ideas into shippable products.
landing.previewSubtitle: From a single requirement to a shippable product, powered by AI.
landing.featuresDesc: All-in-one AI product studio covering the full product lifecycle
landing.featuresDescSuffix: Requirements, templates, materials, videos, and delivery records keep compounding in one workspace.
landing.featuresDirectorCaption: Prompts, storyboards, materials, and versions move forward together
landing.featureAiDesc: Describe requirements in natural language, AI generates PRDs, code, and designs
landing.featureTemplateDesc: Industry templates and best practices to kickstart any project
landing.featureArchiveDesc: All generated PRDs, code, and designs are auto-archived and organized
landing.featureReuseDesc: Quickly iterate on past outputs with efficient secondary editing
landing.featureExportDesc: Multiple formats for team collaboration and client delivery
landing.workflowDesc: Tell AI what you want, it handles the rest
landing.step1Desc: Describe your idea in natural language or pick a template
landing.step2Desc: AI produces PRDs, code, or design artifacts
landing.step3Desc: Review, iterate, and perfect the output
landing.trustTitle: Trusted by Teams Using Amux Studio
landing.ctaDesc: Sign up for free credits and experience AI-powered product generation
landing.footerDesc: AI Product Studio — PRD · Code · Design · Prototype, all generated in one place.
landing.heroVideoDescSuffix: Now templates, materials, and an AI director can live in the same video creation pipeline.
landing.previewMaterialsReady: Reference images, audio, and video materials connected
landing.mktTitle: AI resource marketplace, ready to use
landing.mktDesc: Image and video templates in one place, points-based, one-click activate to a conversation.
landing.workbenchImageDesc: Centrally manage size, quality, count, CFG, steps, seed, negative prompts and prompt tuning for GPT Image, Gemini and compatible image models.
landing.workbenchVideoDesc: Powered by Seedance API. AI Director generates storyboards on the left, edit clip duration in the center, and insert images, videos, and audio on the right.
landing.higherPlanIncludesPrevious: Higher-tier memberships include all benefits from the previous tier by default.
landing.testimonial1Content: Amux Studio took me from writing a PRD to a working prototype in 10 minutes — it used to take half a day. The AI understands intent far better than I expected!
landing.testimonial2Content: I describe the requirements and it generates the code scaffold directly, saving tons of setup work. It is now the first step for every new project.
landing.testimonial3Content: Feed in the product requirements and you get a design draft; a little tweaking and it is client-ready. Easily a 3x productivity boost.
landing.faq1A: It generates PRDs, code, UI design drafts, prototypes and more — covering the full journey from requirements to delivery.
landing.faq2Q: How good is the generated code?
landing.faq2A: The AI produces structured code based on best practices across multiple stacks. You can preview, edit and iterate online until it meets your needs.
landing.faq3A: Earn credits via subscription plans, inviting friends and more; each AI generation task consumes credits accordingly.
landing.faq4A: Team collaboration is coming soon, with multi-user editing, permission management and version control.
landing.faq5A: All projects are private by default and never public. The enterprise plan supports data isolation and on-premise deployment for compliance.
landing.videoShowcaseNarrativeDesc: Keep characters, scenes, and atmosphere consistent across multiple shots for brand shorts and story ads.
landing.videoShowcaseCameraDesc: Use tracking, orbiting, quick cuts, and motion rhythm as references inside the creation flow.
landing.videoShowcaseActionDesc: More stable complex motion, collisions, and speed changes for high-impact visual content.
landing.videoShowcaseCampaignDesc: Combine brand messages, campaign themes, and product assets into ready-to-run promotional shorts.
landing.videoShowcaseProductDesc: Generate multiple ad variants from product images while preserving brand identity and testing different angles quickly.
landing.videoShowcaseAudioDesc: Align movement, edit points, and mood with music for music videos, beat cuts, and seasonal content.
landing.videoQuickTemplatesDesc: Choose a brand opener, product ad, holiday greeting, or talking-head template to lock the structure first.
landing.videoQuickChatDesc: Talk with the AI director about audience, selling points, visual style, and shot rhythm, then refine as you go.
landing.videoQuickAgentsDesc: Scripts, storyboards, asset checks, and version reviews can be handled by collaborating Agents.
landing.videoQuickWorkflowTitle: Save it as a video workflow
landing.videoQuickWorkflowDesc: Save templates, conversations, assets, and generation steps so the next run can reuse or continue them.
landing.videoHeroTitle1: Video templates, AI direction, and asset generation,
landing.videoHeroDesc: Built for marketing shorts, product demos, holiday greetings, and knowledge clips. Use templates for structure, assets for visual anchors, and Video Chat to iterate shots, prompts, and generation parameters.
landing.videoOverviewTitle: More than generating one video: turn assets, shots, templates, and delivery into a reusable video production line.
landing.videoOverviewDesc: Reference assets enter the project, the AI director breaks them into shots, and generation results return to the conversation for continued iteration. Teams can produce short-form video steadily around the same templates and asset library.
landing.videoShowcaseTitle: Real video results for faster creative decisions
landing.videoShowcaseDesc: Preview short-film storytelling, dynamic camera moves, product ads, audio rhythm, and other template effects so teams can choose a direction quickly.
landing.videoWorkflowTemplateDesc: Pick brand, marketing, commerce, holiday, and other scenes from the video template market.
landing.videoWorkflowMaterialsDesc: Upload first frames, end frames, reference images, audio, or reference videos.
landing.videoWorkflowDirectorDesc: Use conversations to split shots, edit prompts, and complete ratio and duration parameters.
landing.videoWorkflowDeliveryDesc: Generate, preview, reuse, and archive video results inside the same conversation.
landing.videoWorkflowTitle: Video Chat turns ideas into executable shots
landing.videoWorkflowDesc: It is not just template filling. Keep adjusting shots, assets, ratios, duration, and audio strategy in the conversation. Generated results stay bound to the conversation so you can edit shots, add assets, and reuse clips later.
landing.videoWorkflowShotOneDesc: Product first frame enters with a slow push-in
landing.videoWorkflowShotTwoDesc: Selling-point text appears with synchronized detail close-ups
landing.videoWorkflowShotThreeDesc: Brand ending preserves the final frame for reuse
landing.videoWorkflowMaterialsReady: Product image, poster, and reference audio are ready
landing.videoWorkflowPreviewDesc: Generate a brand short from template variables and reference assets
landing.videoWorkflowPrompt: “Turn this product image into a 15-second launch short for Xiaohongshu, keep the brand blue, and highlight the lightweight selling point in the second segment.”
landing.videoTemplatesTitle: Start from business templates instead of a blank prompt
landing.videoTemplateOpeningDesc: Generate logo, tagline, and product atmosphere together
landing.videoTemplateProductDesc: Turn product images into short videos for commerce campaigns
landing.videoTemplateHolidayDesc: Holiday theme, greeting copy, and branded ending
landing.videoTemplateTalkingDesc: Script segments, shot rhythm, and subtitle guidance
landing.videoQuickTitle: Use templates, Chat, Agents, and Workflow to finish videos
landing.videoQuickDesc: A video creation entry point for teams. Templates define the business structure, Chat aligns creative quickly, Agents break down and verify details, and Workflow saves the whole process as a reusable asset.
landing.videoQuickPreviewDesc: 15s vertical · Product image + selling points + branded ending
landing.videoQuickPrompt: “Use this template to generate a Xiaohongshu new product short, emphasize the lightweight selling point in the second shot, and ask the storyboard Agent to check the rhythm.”
landing.videoFinalTitle: Make video templates your creation entry point
landing.videoFinalDesc: Create templates, upload assets, let the AI director break shots down, then generate and revise in chat. Keep inspiration, assets, and delivery results in the same video production line.
landing.ctaDescSuffix: Start with the first idea and move product, content, and video toward delivery together.
landing.showcaseConsoleTitle: Content, points, and delivery status in one console
landing.showcaseConsoleDesc: Featured work, membership points, plan benefits, and video previews appear together so teams can decide the next creation or delivery step quickly.
landing.showcaseGalleryPreviewDesc: Image templates, video templates, and Agent results all return to the gallery.
landing.workflowDescSuffix: Templates, Chat, Agents, and Workflow form one continuous chain, so every generation can keep being edited, reused, and delivered.
landing.workflowPreviewDesc: Generate documents, interfaces, assets, and video versions in the same conversation
landing.workflowContextDesc: Every piece of feedback enters the current project context and is reused by the next generation.
landing.workflowSummaryAssetsDesc: Images, video, and audio managed together
landing.workflowSummaryDeliveryDesc: Work, versions, and records archived automatically

membership.choosePlan: Choose the right plan for you
membership.packagesDesc: Buy a points pack and get credits instantly
membership.inviteDesc: Invite friends to register. You earn 100 points after their first successful registration.
membership.inviteDisabled: Invite sharing is disabled. Invite codes and links are not being generated.
membership.name: Name
membership.shareDesc: Share your referral link. You'll earn 100 points after your friend's first successful registration.
membership.membershipRequiredForPackagesDesc: Points packs are only available to members. Please subscribe to a membership plan first, then you can purchase point packs.
membership.membershipRequiredForVideoDesc: Video generation is a members-only feature. Please subscribe to a membership plan to access the Video Workbench.
membership.packageTip: Points packs are for topping up extra credits and do not include membership perks. For regular use, subscribe to a membership plan which includes monthly credits, watermark removal, priority queue, and commercial license.
membership.upgradeTip: Membership includes monthly credits and perks — it's not just buying points. Annual plan perks take effect immediately; credits are still delivered monthly.
membership.packageCommercialLicenseNote: Commercial license terms follow your membership or contract
membership.subscriptionAdviceDesc: For regular use, subscribe to a membership plan for monthly credits and more perks.
membership.benefitsTitle: See exactly what each membership tier includes
membership.benefitsDesc: This page reflects the benefits configured in admin. Video generation, commercial license, watermark removal, history retention, and other capabilities update with each membership tier.
membership.downgradeUnavailableHint: Your current membership level is higher than this plan; downgrade purchases are unavailable.
membership.benefitVideoGenerationHint: When disabled, members at this level cannot submit video generation jobs
membership.streakHint: Every 7 successful generation days can unlock short-term gift points based on campaign rules.
membership.noClaimableCampaigns: No rewards are ready to claim.
membership.campaignDefaultDescription: Short-term gift points are granted after completing the specified behavior.
membership.noActiveCampaigns: No active reward campaigns right now.
membership.refundConfirm: Confirm refund and reclaim unused points for this order? Consumed or frozen points will not be forcibly reclaimed.
membership.checkoutPaidDesc: Payment has been confirmed. Your order and points or membership benefits have been updated.
membership.checkoutPendingDesc: Payment is not confirmed yet. Keep this page open or refresh after completing payment.
membership.cancelAtPeriodEndOn: Renewal is cancelled; benefits stay active until expiry
membership.pendingPlanChange: Plan change scheduled for the next cycle:

insufficientPoints.title: Insufficient points
insufficientPoints.descriptionFree: You don't have enough points to complete this action. Subscribe to a membership plan to unlock monthly points and more benefits.
insufficientPoints.descriptionPaid: Your points balance isn't enough for this action. Top up with a points pack, or upgrade your membership for more monthly credits.
insufficientPoints.recommendPacksTitle: Top up with a points pack
insufficientPoints.recommendPacksBody: Add extra credits instantly without changing your subscription.
insufficientPoints.recommendPlansBody: Get more monthly credits, priority queue, and additional member benefits.

role.editDescription: Modify role basic info and description.

permission.title: Permission Management
permission.assignDescription: Configure visible menus and action permissions for role "{roleName}".
permission.editAside: Changes will affect role assignments and permission tree display.
permission.createAside: Can be assigned to roles after creation.
permission.belongDescription: Permissions must be attached to a specific menu to maintain navigation and capability boundaries.
permission.parentMenuEditHelp: Cannot change parent menu in edit mode.
permission.parentMenuCreateHelp: Attach to actual business entry points to avoid scattered permissions.
permission.basicInfoDescription: Define permission name, code, and boundary.
permission.permissionCodeReadonly: Permission code cannot be changed after creation.
permission.permissionCodeHelp: Use resource:action format for easy search and assignment.
permission.permissionCodePattern: Only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and colons allowed
permission.permissionDescriptionHelp: Describe the permission boundary in one sentence.
permission.permissionDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this permission
permission.semanticDescription: Distinguish which side the permission applies to and what action it allows.
permission.irreversible: This action is irreversible. Please confirm carefully.
permission.deleteSystemDesc: This will permanently delete the system and all its menus and permissions.
permission.deleteMenuDesc: This will permanently delete the menu and all its sub-menus and permissions.
permission.deletePermDesc: This will permanently delete this permission entry.
permission.sysCreateDescription: Create a new multi-tenant system entity.
permission.sysCreateAside: After creation, you can continue configuring menus and permissions.
permission.sysEditAside: Disabling a system will restrict related entry points based on its status.
permission.sysBasicInfoDescription: Define the system name, code, and description.
permission.sysCodePattern: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed
permission.sysCodeReadonly: System code cannot be modified after creation.
permission.sysCodeHelp: Use a stable identifier to avoid frequent changes.
permission.sysDescriptionHelp: Describe the target users, responsibilities, and boundaries of the system.
permission.sysStatusSectionDesc: Control system availability and list priority.
permission.menuCreateDescription: Create a new system navigation entry.
permission.menuEditDescription: Adjust menu hierarchy, routing, and display settings.
permission.menuCreateAside: After creation, you can continue configuring permissions for this menu.
permission.menuEditAside: Changes will immediately affect the navigation structure.

permission.menuParentMenuHelp: Select a parent menu within the current system only.
permission.menuBasicInfoDescription: Define menu name, code, and route path.
permission.menuCodePattern: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed
permission.menuCodeReadonly: Menu code cannot be modified after creation.
permission.menuCodeHelp: Use a stable code for future permission linking.
permission.routePathHelp: Should match the actual page route.
permission.routePathPattern: Must start with /, only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and slashes allowed
permission.menuDisplaySettingsDesc: Control menu sorting, icon, and frontend visibility.
permission.detailSelectNodeHint: Click a system, menu, or permission node in the tree to view details.
permission.detailFrontendNote: This permission controls the visibility and interaction state of frontend UI elements.
permission.detailBackendNote: This permission controls access authorization for backend API endpoints.
permission.sysAutoApproveSectionDesc: Control whether newly registered users in this system require manual approval.
permission.sysAutoApproveHelp: When enabled, users who register in this system must still click the activation link sent to their email, but no admin approval is required afterwards.

publish.imageDescriptionPlaceholder: One-liner about what this template does and its highlight

publish.imageVariablesDescription: Define labels, types, and defaults for each '{variable}' in the prompt.
publish.imagePointsHint: Points per generation (0 = base platform points only)
publish.imageRuntimeFixed: Image templates always run in the cloud.
publish.videoPromptPlaceholder: Create a '{duration}'-second marketing short video for...
publish.videoPointsHint: Points per generation (video costs more than image)
publish.videoRuntimeFixed: Video templates always run in the cloud.
publish.skillDescriptionPlaceholder: One-liner about what this Skill does for the user
publish.skillInstructionsDescription: When activated, instructions are appended to the system prompt. Prefer structured Markdown.
publish.skillFrontmatterDescription: Optional metadata: model / temperature / requiredMcps. Declaring hooks/scripts marks this as DESKTOP_ONLY.
publish.skillVariablesDescription: Define inputs the user provides at activation time, if any.
publish.skillSuspectedDesktop: Desktop dependency suspected. Please explicitly choose CLOUD or DESKTOP_ONLY in "Runtime". Reason: {reason}
publish.skillRuntimeDetectionHint: hooks/scripts → DESKTOP_ONLY; local paths → DESKTOP_ONLY; local keywords → SUSPECTED_DESKTOP (must be set explicitly)
publish.mcpDescriptionPlaceholder: What does this MCP server provide?
publish.mcpEnvDescription: Declare keys/params the user must configure when installing. required=true forces the user to fill it.
publish.mcpDetectionLocalUrl: URL points to localhost/private network → DESKTOP_ONLY
publish.mcpDetectionLocalEnv: env contains local path variables → DESKTOP_ONLY
publish.agentDescriptionPlaceholder: One-liner about the Agent's workflow and goal
publish.agentSystemPromptDescription: The Agent's core persona and workflow. Prefer structured: role → input contract → steps → output format.
publish.agentSystemPromptPlaceholder:
You are ___ Agent, your goal is ___.

Workflow:
1. ___
2. ___
3. ___
publish.agentToolsDescription: MCPs and Skills available to the Agent. If any binding is DESKTOP_ONLY, the Agent will be marked DESKTOP_ONLY automatically.
publish.agentVariablesDescription: Define startup parameters the Agent needs (e.g. brand name, tone), if any.
publish.agentDetectionHint: If any bound MCP/Skill is DESKTOP_ONLY → the Agent is DESKTOP_ONLY
publish.mcpConfigDescription: Paste a Cursor/Amux Studio Desktop compatible MCP config. We sanitize env/header secrets before storing.
publish.mcpInstallNotesPlaceholder: Optional setup notes, required scopes, or local prerequisites.
publish.mcpSecurityNotesPlaceholder: Optional permission and data access notes for reviewers/users.
publish.mcpTitleOptionalHint: Leave blank to use the server name
publish.skillMarkdownDescription: Paste the real SKILL.md. YAML frontmatter is parsed automatically; the Markdown body becomes instructions.
publish.skillMarkdownPlaceholder:
---
name: Code Review Expert
description: Review PR diffs with a senior engineer lens
model: gpt-5
tags:
  - code-review
---

# Instructions

Review code for correctness, risks, tests, and maintainability.

home.title: Create what spreads.

adminTaskCosts.title: Pricing Rules
adminTaskCosts.description: Maintain pricing rules for real business tasks. Missing rules block the corresponding workflow from running.
adminTaskCosts.categoryDescription: Only fields used by tasks in this category are shown.

modelScope.empty: No system models match this task type
modelScope.incompatible: This model uses a different pricing parameter set and cannot be grouped in this rule

baseCost.label: Base points
baseCost.hint: Fixed cost per unit. message/task/image means per message/task/image; second means per second.

inputTokenCostPerK.label: Input Token / K
inputTokenCostPerK.hint: Applies to chat and prompt optimization tasks.

outputTokenCostPerK.label: Output Token / K
outputTokenCostPerK.hint: Applies to chat and prompt optimization tasks.

contextTokenCostPerK.label: Context Token / K
contextTokenCostPerK.hint: Only applies to chat tasks. Can be left blank.

toolCallCost.label: Tool call / each
toolCallCost.hint: Extra points for each tool call.

mcpCallCost.label: MCP call / each
mcpCallCost.hint: Extra points for each MCP tool call.

skillCallCost.label: Skill call / each
skillCallCost.hint: Extra points when a Skill participates.

batchUnitCost.label: Batch unit points
batchUnitCost.hint: Added by batch count for batch generation.

fixedExtraCost.label: Fixed extra points
fixedExtraCost.hint: Usually not needed for current business tasks. Can be left blank.

referenceImageFixedCost.label: Reference image fixed points
referenceImageFixedCost.hint: Added when image/video tasks include a reference image.

referenceImageMultiplier.label: Reference image multiplier
referenceImageMultiplier.hint: Multiplied when image/video tasks include a reference image. Can be left blank.

videoInputMultiplier.label: Video input multiplier
videoInputMultiplier.hint: Multiplied when video tasks include reference video. Can be left blank.

audioInputMultiplier.label: Audio input multiplier
audioInputMultiplier.hint: Multiplied when video tasks include audio input or generate audio. Can be left blank.

priorityMultiplier.label: Priority queue multiplier
priorityMultiplier.hint: Multiplied when priority execution is used. Can be left blank.

chat_message_fast.name: Fast chat
chat_message_fast.description: Single-message cost for mini, flash, and fast models in regular chat.

chat_message_standard.name: Standard chat
chat_message_standard.description: Default cost for regular chat messages when no special tier matches.

chat_message_reasoning.name: Reasoning chat
chat_message_reasoning.description: Chat message cost for reasoning, thinking, and o-series models.

image_generation.name: Image generation
image_generation.description: Unified task for all image generation; quality, size, and model are pricing-rule conditions.

video_generation.name: Video generation
video_generation.description: Unified task for all video generation; resolution, duration, and model are pricing-rule conditions.

prompt_optimize_generation.name: Image prompt optimization
prompt_optimize_generation.description: Used when AI Optimize Prompt is clicked in the image workbench, billed as 1 point plus input/output tokens.

video_template_optimize.name: Video template optimization
video_template_optimize.description: Video clip prompt or video template prompt optimization, billed as 1 point plus input/output tokens.

video_storyboard_optimize.name: Video storyboard optimization
video_storyboard_optimize.description: Overall prompt optimization and storyboard script generation, billed as 1 point plus input/output tokens.

prompt_optimize_pro.name: Artifact document AI optimization
prompt_optimize_pro.description: Used for streaming Artifact document optimization, billed as 1 point plus input/output tokens.
